items.title: Rich directive notifications with context
items.context: macOS and browser notifications contain zero directive context — just session IDs. CEO must context-switch to terminal. Connect DirectiveWatcher to Notifier with directive name, initiative counts, and Needs CEO Eyes count.

items.title: Eliminate heavyweight directive double-spawn
items.context: Heavyweight directives require two background agent spawns — planning then execution. Each spawn takes 15-30s. Option A: Alex pauses at approval gate by watching a file write. Option B: Alex returns summary, CEO approves, sends message to still-running agent.

items.title: Directive-aware notification context
items.context: Notifier only knows session ID and project — no directive context. Cannot distinguish directive completion from random session. Emit directive_completed event from DirectiveWatcher, subscribe in Notifier.

items.title: UX verification: one instruction, not a checklist
items.context: SKILL.md prescribes a 5-item QA checklist for UX verification. Ideal is one focused test instruction per initiative — the single most important thing the CEO should verify, with exact URL and expected result.
